# Pre-work Intake Form (Customer-friendly)

**Instructions:** Ideally completed asynchronously before the first discovery call.

## 1) Problem & outcomes
- What problem/opportunity are you addressing (1–2 sentences)?
- What outcomes matter (time saved, cost reduced, revenue, risk reduction)?
- How will you measure success 90 days after go-live?

## 2) Users & workflows
- Who are the primary user roles?
- What are the top 3 tasks they must complete end-to-end?

## 3) Current state
- What tools/processes do you use today?
- Where does the process fail (delays, errors, compliance risk)?

## 4) Systems and constraints
- What systems/data does this touch (ERP/CRM/Identity/files/data warehouse)?
- Any hard constraints (SSO, data residency, on-prem only, etc.)?

## 5) Timeline and governance
- Target go-live date and what drives it?
- Who approves purchase? Who can block it (IT, Security, Procurement)?

## Evidence to attach (if possible)
- 1–3 screenshots or sample docs from the current workflow
- Sample data export or a dummy example record
- List of systems involved and technical owners (names/emails)
